dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes trend-following (avoid counter-trend trades) with strong directional confirmation (ADX > 30). Entry aligns price with trend direction using SMA_20 as trend baseline. Exit triggers on trend exhaustion (ADX < 20). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries depending on which direction the trend is moving. Counter-trend position size multiplier of 0.0 is noted but not implementable in this JSON schema.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes trend-following (avoid counter-trend trades) with strong directional confirmation (ADX > 30). Entry aligns price with trend direction using SMA_20 as trend baseline. Exit triggers on trend exhaustion (ADX < 20). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries depending on which direction the trend is moving. Counter-trend position size multiplier of 0.0 is noted but not implementable in this JSON schema.

source_rule_text: A trader should avoid initiating trades counter to the prevailing trend, as they statistically underperform trend-aligned trades, despite occasional outlier successes.
